# Rules for src-tauri/src/observability.rs

<!-- Generated by proofd. Source: src-tauri/src/observability.rs. Do not edit manually. -->

## Debug Panel (debug-panel)

- [DP-15] Structured performance spans flow into the same observability stream as app logs. Frontend perfTrace emits perf.span entries for trace/traceAsync/traceSync/manual spans, and backend observability helpers mirror the same schema so timings from hot frontend and Rust control paths can be filtered together in the debug log.
